{{Infobox character
| name = Architect
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] have seats in alcoves within the [[Council]] room.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] designed the [[Empire]] and laid its foundation.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] are a group that can be trained in [[alchemy]], [[Reading]], or leadership.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Architects]] are pet creatures of [[Yala]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We are the architects who designed the Empire, and the masons who laid its foundation.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
